blockingIssues.description: Line 107 (now ~125 in current): ExtractionConfig defaults store_path to `.skills` but AGENTS.md specifies user-extensible skills should be in `.swell/skills/`. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 12).
Line 139 (now ~142): TrajectoryAnalyzer has #[allow(dead_code)] attribute and its store field is never used for database lookups. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 12).
Line 955: Confidence calculation uses sum of all pattern frequencies (frequency_map.values().sum()) as denominator instead of per-pattern frequency. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 12).

Line 1145: Convention parsing uses wrong string slice index [3..] instead of [4..]. For input '- **name**: description', position 0='-', 1=' ', 2='*', 3='*', 4='n'. Name starts at index 4. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 12).
Line 1173: get_anti_patterns_for_error is an unimplemented stub returning empty vec with comment 'For MVP, return empty'. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 12).
blockingIssues.evidence: crates/swell-memory/src/pattern_learning.rs: Ok(Vec::new()) with 'For MVP, return empty' comment

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: CRITICAL: 5 blocking issues have persisted for 12 rounds without resolution across 2 features (memory-skill-extraction, memory-pattern-learning). These are well-identified, localized bugs with exact line numbers. The orchestrator should create HIGH-PRIORITY dedicated fix features for each blocking issue that get auto-assigned. The current approach of re-running scrutiny on the same features without focused fixes has failed for 12 consecutive rounds.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 5 issues marked 'STILL NOT FIXED since round 1' with file:line evidence. No code changes made to address these issues across 12 rounds.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Fix features should be created for memory-skill-extraction (2 issues) and memory-pattern-learning (3 issues) with explicit requirement to fix each listed issue. These are NOT implementation gaps - the code is complete but contains logic bugs that require targeted fixes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The features are marked 'completed' but contain logic errors in specific lines that don't affect test pass/fail but break functionality

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Skill mismatch issue: features.json specifies skillName 'rust-worker' but the available skill is 'Rust'. Workers should check for skill availability and report mismatch if the specified skill doesn't exist. This was observed across multiple memory feature workers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory-sqlite-store and memory-memory-blocks reviewers both noted the rust-worker skill was not found

rejectedObservations.reason: The file exists at .factory/services.yaml. Workers may have been looking in the wrong directory.
